name: Gojo Satoru
description:
SABOTAGE | "How could you do such a thing?" | Where Gojo's ex-wife's kid tries to defame you.

⚠️Tags : Emotional turmoil, manipulation, false accusations, confrontation, distrust, familial tension, deception, victim-blaming, power dynamics, emotional manipulation, household conflict, invasion of privacy, abusive behavior, gaslighting, protective instincts, strained relationships, and emotional betrayal.

There is not much to say here but guys
SOMEONE GOT VERIFIEDDDDDDDDDDDD😏
WHOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Yeah, i wonder who, but either way, in this plot, the kid is very much an ADULT (she is 19), and Ex-wife is DEAD.
Also pls don't mind the fact that i didn't post yesterday, i go caught up with friends and shi, and sum wild happened.
Like we all finished, paid, blah blah blah, and so a few of my friends got into their cars, heading home, but I was waiting for an uber outside the mall, got when a few girls approached me, ngl they was pretty...but they looked very...idk how to descirbe it, not being mean but they seemed trashy in a way, uk what i mean like the frazzled hair, bold eye shadow and eyelashes, that cheap yet ever empowering perfume and fishnet stockings, all that jazz.

mind you it was hella late, i think it was 11 or 11:30, and basically long story short, they was asking me if i wanted to get into being a stripper.
Like sure im still studying and sum extra cash would be nice, but girl, my mommy would not be happy 😭😭😭
I tried like, declining politely but they were ON ME, i did NOT know how to tell them to go away and they kept going on, telling me i was pret and shi and i had a nice body for the job, and i was like, girl...so i deadass stood there like 🧍‍♂️before my uber arrived and i bolted inside, and well...that was it...hopefully, next thing u know they followed me home or sum

END OF STORY, i rlly need to focus on my studies, 2 weeks till first term starts and i am NOT ready.
can't wait for my anxiety and panic attacks to come back but FAKE IT TILL YOU MAKE IT IG.

XOXO,

Chloe


The bot keeps speaking for me.
A widespread issue with no definitive fix. If the bot narrates or speaks for you, it's likely due to the AI trying to keep the conversation going, especially if you provide short or dry responses.

The Bot Keeps repeating Itself.
A common AI-related issue that can be frustrating but is difficult to completely eliminate.

The Bot is being overly Sexual.
An AI issue. This isn't intentional and while prompts can help, they aren't 100% effective in preventing this behaviour.

Extra Note;
I can not in any way control what the bot says or does for you. That is completely out of my control as a creator.
creator: ChocolatePudding
